title: Home
system_description:
A modern solution built with Vue 3 and Spring Boot,
providing efficient, secure, and reliable technical support for your business.
feature_permission_desc: RBAC-based fine-grained permission control with flexible user, role, and menu configuration
feature_architecture_desc: Frontend-backend separation design, RESTful API standards, microservice-ready
feature_security_desc: JWT authentication, XSS/CSRF protection, SQL injection prevention, comprehensive security
feature_efficiency_desc: Complete code generator, rich component library, significantly improve development efficiency
